seoTitle: Dyrring vs Eagle Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dyrring and Eagle Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dyrring vs Eagle Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dyrring and Eagle Vale.
heading: Dyrring vs Eagle Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dyrring, New South Wales and Eagle Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eagle Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Dyrring (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dyrring or Eagle Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dyrring has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Eagle Vale scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dyrring scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Eagle Vale scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dyrring or Eagle Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eagle Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
